name: snap_fit
description: Rigid-transform an object so one of its ports mates a target frame. Companion to measure_joints: give a source port (its world center + axis) and a target frame (center + axis), and the whole object is moved and rotated so the source center lands on the target center with the axes aligned. Use it to seat a part's socket onto another part's ball / a coupler stud, then chain components into an assembly. nearest (default true) flips the target axis if it points away, taking the nearest of the two opposite alignments; set false to align exactly.

source_center.description: World-space center of the source port [x,y,z].

source_axis.description: World-space axis of the source port [x,y,z].

nearest.description: Flip target axis if it points away (nearest of two alignments). Default true.

author: modeler-agent
